action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 12 eval failed because predict.py attempted to download resnet50 weights in the offline eval environment. The torchvision deeplabv3_resnet50 defaults to weights_backbone=IMAGENET1K_V1, triggering a download. Analysis: Must explicitly set weights_backbone=None to prevent any download. Our trained checkpoint from iter 10 (DeepLabV3, val mIoU 0.273) contains the fine-tuned weights, so we can load them into an uninitialized model without any network call. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to pass weights_backbone=None, remove TORCH_HOME override, and submit eval immediately with the best checkpoint. No training command needed; time remaining only 0.2h, must secure a score.
